title: Lyrics for Eva soundtracks
wikitext: []: Lyrics for Eva soundtracks.             Quote Post by SpacemanSchmuck » Thu Sep 24, 2009 4:49 pm Hi everyone. I love the music of Evangelion, and from noticing a few lyrics here and there in the Rebuild camrips I got, (plus precendent like Komm Susser Tod) I started thinking the lyrics are probably going to give me more insight into what's going on in the new movies. So I've been spending some time today trying to round up lyrics for everything Evangelion, and having a bit of a tough time of it. I'm finding the lyrics but they are all split up in somewhat bothersome navigation, and it just seems like it's going to be hours of work when I kind of have some other stuff to do just now. What I'm hoping for is one text-based document with just all of them, or perhaps different text files for the different soundtrack releases. Instead I'm having to save whole pages just to get the few lyrics to "The Final Decision We All Must Take" which as most of you know basically just has two lines. So I hope this isn't annoying, but I have been looking and coming up with no luck. Does anyone know if this has already been done? long story short : Evangelion lyrics, can I please has them? Thanks in advance! [url][/url]

Article: Lyrics for Eva soundtracks
[]: Lyrics for Eva soundtracks.             Quote Post by SpacemanSchmuck » Thu Sep 24, 2009 4:49 pm Hi everyone. I love the music of Evangelion, and from noticing a few lyrics here and there in the Rebuild camrips I got, (plus precendent like Komm Susser Tod) I started thinking the lyrics are probably going to give me more insight into what's going on in the new movies. So I've been spending some time today trying to round up lyrics for everything Evangelion, and having a bit of a tough time of it. I'm finding the lyrics but they are all split up in somewhat bothersome navigation, and it just seems like it's going to be hours of work when I kind of have some other stuff to do just now. What I'm hoping for is one text-based document with just all of them, or perhaps different text files for the different soundtrack releases. Instead I'm having to save whole pages just to get the few lyrics to "The Final Decision We All Must Take" which as most of you know basically just has two lines. So I hope this isn't annoying, but I have been looking and coming up with no luck. Does anyone know if this has already been done? long story short : Evangelion lyrics, can I please has them? Thanks in advance! [url][/url]
